text: Violent clashes have been ongoing since the morning between the resistance and occupation forces on the outskirts of the city of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon.
text_zh: 自黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒市郊区以来，抵抗力量与占领军之间一直持续着激烈的冲突。

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 Russia and Cuba are discussing the resumption of flights - Deputy Foreign Minister Ryabkov at a press conference at the Russian Embassy in Havana. Russia is not going to leave the Western Hemisphere, no matter what they say in Washington, he said. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇺 俄罗斯与古巴正在讨论恢复航班事宜——俄罗斯副外长里亚布科夫在俄罗斯驻哈瓦那大使馆的新闻发布会上表示。他说，无论华盛顿方面怎么说，俄罗斯都不会离开西半球。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Zelensky: It’s a pity, but we have to recognize that some Americans feel that it’s not such a big price for us—for peace—to leave our territories. They don’t want to recognize that Putin will lie to them and continue the occupation even after such steps. I think that is the biggest problem: we don’t trust Putin, but they do.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：很遗憾，但我们必须承认，一些美国人认为，为了和平而放弃我们的领土对我们来说代价并不大。他们不想承认，普京即使在采取这些步骤后也会欺骗他们并继续占领。我认为这是最大的问题：我们不信任普京，但他们信任。

text: Zelensky: With Ukraine, Türkiye, Norway and UK you will control security on the seas — not one sea.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：有了乌克兰、土耳其、挪威和英国，你们将控制海上的安全——不仅仅是一个海域。

text: Zelensky: We have to save our country, and then the economy. First of all, security; second is the economy—not the other way around.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：我们必须先拯救我们的国家，然后才是经济。首先是安全，其次是经济，而不是反过来。

text: Zelensky: Without Ukraine and Türkiye, Europe will not have an army similar to Russia’s.
text_zh: 泽连斯基：没有乌克兰和土耳其，欧洲将不会拥有一支类似于俄罗斯的军队。

text: Open Source Intel The IDF reports it has taken out more than 200 rocket launchers belonging to Hezbollah and killed over 250 members of its artillery units since the start of the fighting in Lebanon. It says the destroyed launchers contained around 1,300 barrels in total. Among those killed were 15 commanders, including the head of artillery in Hezbollah’s Nasr regional division, which operates in the Mount Dov–Bint Jbeil sector. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：以色列国防军报告称，自黎巴嫩战斗开始以来，已摧毁了真主党所属的200多个火箭发射器，并击毙了其炮兵部队的250多名成员。以军称，被摧毁的发射器总共包含约1300个发射管。在被击毙的人员中，有15名指挥官，其中包括在多夫山-宾特朱拜勒地区活动的真主党纳斯尔地区师的炮兵主管。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 Volodymyr Zelensky: 🗣️ “Within a month, we eliminate roughly the same number of occupiers that Russia mobilizes, yet their overall force inside Ukraine continues to grow.” 📌 “This suggests they are reinforcing their troops by pulling from strategic reserves. We believe this is a risky move, as it weakens their border defenses elsewhere, where the situation is already not easy for them — but they have still chosen this path.” 📌 “I also mentioned our meeting with British intelligence — we have a relationship based on trust. Their assessment is that Russia does not have the capacity to sustain this process.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇦 弗拉基米尔·泽连斯基：🗣️ “在一个月内，我们消灭的占领者人数与俄罗斯动员的人数大致相当，但他们在乌克兰境内的总兵力仍在持续增长。” 📌 “这表明他们正在通过从战略预备队抽调兵力来加强部队。我们认为这是一个冒险的举动，因为它削弱了他们其他地方的边境防御，那里的局势对他们来说已经不容易了——但他们仍然选择了这条路。” 📌 “我还提到了我们与英国情报部门的会面——我们之间有着基于信任的关系。他们的评估是，俄罗斯没有能力维持这一进程。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: WarTranslated Hungary's intelligence services have been using Israeli-made surveillance tools to track hundreds of millions of people, @OsintFlow reports citing a VSquare and Citizen Lab investigation. The most powerful tool is Webloc, which pulls GPS, Wi-Fi, and ad data from over 500 million phones worldwide. It builds detailed profiles including home addresses, daily routines, political views, and health conditions. The purchases were run through SCI-Network Ltd., headed by a former counterintelligence officer with ties to Orban's cabinet chief Antal Rogan, who controls both civilian intelligence and the PM's propaganda machine. Licenses were renewed in March 2026 – just weeks before Hungary's elections. /16941 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：据 @OsintFlow 援引 VSquare 和 Citizen Lab 的调查报道，匈牙利情报部门一直在使用以色列制造的监控工具来追踪数亿人。最强大的工具是 Webloc，它从全球超过5亿部手机中提取 GPS、Wi-Fi 和广告数据。它构建了详细的档案，包括家庭住址、日常生活习惯、政治观点和健康状况。这些采购是通过 SCI-Network Ltd. 进行的，该公司由一名与欧尔班内阁幕僚长安塔尔·罗甘（Antal Rogan）有联系的前反间谍官员领导，罗甘控制着民事情报和总理的宣传机器。许可证于2026年3月续期——就在匈牙利大选前几周。/16941 推文

text: Open Source Intel Yesterday, Eyal Zamir, the IDF Chief of Staff, visited the outskirts of Bint Jbeil in southern Lebanon, where Israeli forces are engaged in combat with Hezbollah operatives. Speaking to troops, he said: "Our main combat arena is here in Lebanon. The objective defined for you is the removal of the direct threat to the residents of the north, which you are carrying out with determination," On Iran, he added: "Iran's achievements in the war against Iran are unprecedented and historic." "Iran before this war is not the same Iran; it is much weaker. We are prepared to return to combat with full force if required at any given moment," He was accompanied by Northern Command chief Rafi Milo, Technological and Logistics Directorate head Rami Abudraham, and 98th Division commander Guy Levy. After the visit, the IDF said Zamir approved updated operational plans for continued operations against Hezbollah. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：昨天，以色列国防军总参谋长埃亚尔·扎米尔（Eyal Zamir）访问了黎巴嫩南部宾特朱拜勒郊区，以色列军队正在那里与真主党武装人员交战。在对部队发表讲话时，他说：“我们的主要作战舞台就在黎巴嫩。为你们设定的目标是消除对北部居民的直接威胁，你们正在坚定地执行这一目标。”关于伊朗，他补充说：“伊朗在对伊战争中取得的成就是前所未有的，也是历史性的。”“这场战争之前的伊朗已经不是同一个伊朗了；它虚弱得多。如果需要，我们随时准备全力以赴重返战斗。”陪同他访问的有北方司令部司令拉菲·米洛（Rafi Milo）、技术与后勤局局长拉米·阿布德拉汉（Rami Abudraham）和第98师师长盖伊·列维（Guy Levy）。访问后，以色列国防军表示扎米尔批准了针对真主党继续行动的更新作战计划。推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 According to BBC, Xi Jinping met with the leader of Taiwan’s main opposition party, the Kuomintang, in a rare meeting where both sides emphasized the desire for peace across the Taiwan Strait. Xi stated that the two parties are meeting to safeguard peace and stability, promote peaceful cross-strait relations, and provide future generations with a better future. The meeting took place at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing. He also said China is ready to strengthen dialogue with various parties, including the Kuomintang, under a shared political foundation opposing Taiwan independence. Xi reiterated that people on both sides of the Taiwan Strait are Chinese and share a common desire for peace. In response, Cheng said that the rejuvenation of the Chinese nation is a shared aspiration for people on both sides of the strait and would contribute positively to global peace and human progress. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇨🇳 🇹🇼 据英国广播公司（BBC）报道，习近平在北京会见了台湾主要反对党国民党主席，双方在罕见的会晤中强调了维护台湾海峡和平的愿望。习近平表示，两党会面是为了维护和平稳定，促进两岸关系和平发展，为子孙后代提供更好的未来。会晤在北京人民大会堂举行。他还表示，中国愿在反对台独的共同政治基础上，加强与包括国民党在内的各方对话。习近平重申，海峡两岸同胞都是中国人，有着共同的和平愿望。对此，程表示，中华民族的复兴是海峡两岸同胞的共同愿望，将为世界和平与人类进步做出积极贡献。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: 🇺🇦 Ukrainians call for fighting until victory but flee from mobilization - Budanov. "There are real problems, let's say, mental problems in our society. Because, on the one hand, everyone says that we need to fight until victory - and on the other hand, everyone is fleeing from mobilization. And all this is happening at the same time. This is a big, huge problem. He added that when those who serve return from the front, "they will start asking questions to their neighbors who haven't gone." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 布达诺夫：乌克兰人呼吁战斗到底，但却逃避动员。“我们的社会中存在真正的问题，可以说是心理问题。因为一方面，每个人都说我们需要战斗到胜利——而另一方面，每个人都在逃避动员。所有这一切都在同时发生。这是一个巨大的、严重的问题。”他补充说，当那些服役的人从前线回来时，“他们会开始质问那些没有去参战的邻居。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 A two-week ceasefire will not return the energy market to normal conditions. Hashem Orei, head of the Union of Iran's Energy Scientific Associations, told IRNA: The two-week ceasefire agreement will not normalize conditions in the energy market, and what has occurred in the form of falling oil prices has been a release of part of the price bubble. If the ceasefire is fully implemented, the normal process of energy transportation will gradually resume, and this can reduce the psychological pressure on the oil market. It is predicted that if the ceasefire is properly implemented, a large number of ships that have been stopped in the region will be able to resume movement. In that case, global oil prices will drop quickly. However, I do not think prices will reach the range of $50 or $60, because concerns still remain in the market. My prediction is that oil prices will likely settle in the range of about $80 to $90, as the market will wait for the outcome of negotiations.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 为期两周的停火不会使能源市场恢复正常。伊朗能源科学协会联盟负责人哈希姆·奥雷（Hashem Orei）告诉伊朗伊斯兰共和国通讯社（IRNA）：为期两周的停火协议不会使能源市场状况正常化，油价下跌只是价格泡沫的一部分释放。如果停火得到全面执行，能源运输的正常流程将逐渐恢复，这可以减轻石油市场的心理压力。据预测，如果停火得到妥善执行，大量在区域内停滞的船只将能够恢复航行。在这种情况下，全球油价将迅速下跌。然而，我不认为价格会达到50美元或60美元的区间，因为市场仍然存在担忧。我的预测是，油价可能会稳定在80美元至90美元左右的区间，因为市场将等待谈判结果。

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 Zelensky also gives his ideas about the Telegram ban in Russia - of course, trying to stir up fear 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🔵 🇷🇺 泽连斯基也表达了他对俄罗斯封禁 Telegram 的看法——当然，试图煽动恐惧 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ Financial Times: Trump threatened the NATO Secretary General The Financial Times reported on Friday, citing unnamed sources, that Trump threatened during a meeting with Rutte to punish those NATO member countries that did not assist Washington in the war against Iran. According to the report: "According to people familiar with the closed-door negotiations, Trump was angry during his meeting with Rutte at the White House. He threatened to punish European countries that he believed did not sufficiently support [operations against Iran]." Meanwhile, Financial Times sources added that Trump did not specify what actions he might take against these countries.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇪🇺 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 金融时报：特朗普威胁北约秘书长。据《金融时报》周五援引未具名消息来源报道，特朗普在与吕特会面时威胁称，要惩罚那些在对伊战争中不协助华盛顿的北约成员国。据报道：“据熟悉闭门谈判的人士称，特朗普在白宫与吕特会面时非常愤怒。他威胁要惩罚那些他认为没有充分支持[对伊行动]的欧洲国家。”与此同时，《金融时报》的消息来源补充说，特朗普没有具体说明他可能对这些国家采取什么行动。

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 Zelensky thinks that Russia will be scared by the NATO summit ‘It's important that there be enough pressure on Russia. For example, partners could hold an absolutely unprecedented, historic, pivotal, and, in a certain sense, victorious NATO summit this year. But this depends on them — what they are really ready for and how responsibly they approach the threats that are directed not against one person, but against everyone.’ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 🇷🇺 泽连斯基认为俄罗斯会被北约峰会吓到：“重要的是对俄罗斯施加足够的压力。例如，合作伙伴可以在今年举行一次绝对前所未有的、历史性的、关键的，在某种意义上是胜利的北约峰会。但这取决于他们——他们真正准备好了什么，以及他们如何负责任地对待那些不是针对一个人，而是针对所有人的威胁。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 Zelensky wants to secure the deployment of US and European military bases in Ukraine as part of post-war security guarantees. "If we're talking about reliable security guarantees, that means we need sufficient air defense systems. I don't believe that the Russians won't want to come again. But I believe that if there's an American military base or a joint American-European base in Ukraine, we'll have fewer risks," the president said during a conversation with journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🏁 泽连斯基希望作为战后安全保障的一部分，确保美国和欧洲在乌克兰部署军事基地。总统在与记者交谈时说：“如果我们谈论可靠的安全保障，这意味着我们需要足够的防空系统。我不相信俄罗斯人不会想再来。但我相信，如果乌克兰有美国军事基地或美欧联合基地，我们的风险就会降低。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Zelensky claims that they kill as many Russians a month as Russia manages to mobilize - but the number of Russian troops in Ukraine is still increasing "In a month, we destroy the same number of occupiers that they mobilize, but at the same time, the number of their military groups in Ukraine is increasing. That is, we believe that they are increasing their grouping by involving military personnel from the strategic reserve. And we discussed this with the Commander-in-Chief and the Chief of the General Staff - how to counteract it," Zelensky told journalists. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基声称他们每月消灭的俄罗斯人数量与俄罗斯设法动员的人数相当——但俄罗斯在乌克兰的军队人数仍在增加。泽连斯基告诉记者：“在一个月内，我们消灭的占领者人数与他们动员的人数相当，但与此同时，他们在乌克兰的军事集团数量却在增加。也就是说，我们认为他们通过动员战略预备队的军事人员来增加兵力。我们与总司令及总参谋长讨论了如何应对这一问题。”

text: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 Ukraine will enter a difficult period of pressure from Russia on the front and the US in negotiations by September, Zelensky said. "If Russia chooses the path of de-escalation, I believe that a trilateral meeting will take place. And they will try to hold it in April, May or June. I think these are key months for them. And I think it will be very difficult for us until September. This spring-summer period will be challenging - both politically and diplomatically. There may be pressure on Ukraine. And it will also be on the battlefield," Zelensky said in an interview with journalists. He believes that if this pressure does not result in a solution, the US will withdraw from the negotiations before the Congress elections. "In my opinion, the Americans will not give anyone more time for this dialogue. The US will increasingly focus on internal processes - the elections - starting from the summer. And I think they have a kind of internal political deadline - roughly August," Zelensky said. He says that it is during this period that Russia may intensify its actions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 💬 🇷🇺 泽连斯基表示，乌克兰将在9月前进入一个艰难时期，面临来自前线俄罗斯和谈判中美国的压力。“如果俄罗斯选择缓和局势的道路，我相信三方会议将会举行。他们会试图在4月、5月或6月举行。我认为这对他们来说是关键的月份。我认为在9月之前对我们来说会非常困难。这个春夏时期将充满挑战——无论是在政治上还是外交上。乌克兰可能会面临压力。战场上也会如此。”泽连斯基在接受记者采访时说。他认为，如果这种压力不能带来解决方案，美国将在国会选举前退出谈判。“在我看来，美国人不会再给任何人时间进行这种对话。从夏天开始，美国将越来越多地关注内部进程——选举。我认为他们有一种内部政治截止日期——大约在8月。”泽连斯基说。他说，正是在这段时期，俄罗斯可能会加强其行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 Trump endorses Orban again 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇭🇺 特朗普再次支持欧尔班 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Chief of Indian Army Staff General Upendra Dwivedi on 2025 India–Pakistan conflict: We made sure that when the people on the other side are going through that Namaz prayer in the terrorist camp, we said this time we'll not touch. Because God is one for everyone.
text_zh: 印度陆军参谋长乌彭德拉·德维迪（Upendra Dwivedi）将军谈及2025年印巴冲突：我们确保当对方的人在恐怖营地进行礼拜时，我们说这次我们不动手。因为上帝对每个人来说都是一样的。

text: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The number of settlers wounded in the Iranian and Hezbollah attacks has reached 8,000. Officials in the Zionist regime's Ministry of Health, who usually censor their casualty figures, reported today that during the war against Iran and Lebanon, 7,993 Zionists have been wounded.
text_zh: 🟡 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 在伊朗和真主党的袭击中受伤的定居者人数已达8000人。通常审查伤亡数字的犹太复国主义政权卫生部官员今天报告称，在对伊和黎巴嫩的战争中，已有7993名犹太复国主义者受伤。

text: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The true face of Norman Finkelstein Lebanese have a right to be angry with Hezbollah over sacrifices made for Iran — Norman Finkelstein “They have a right to live… they didn’t want to be sacrificed. Hezbollah also had a responsibility to come to Iran’s aid… attacked by forces seeking to end its civilization.” - > Hezbollah exists because of the occupation. What Norman says about Hezbollah is wrong. Hezbollah was created in response to Israel’s occupation of Lebanon. And no, this footage is not fake or fabricated. Watch the full interview here.
text_zh: 🇱🇧 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 诺曼·芬克尔斯坦的真面目。黎巴嫩人有权对真主党为伊朗做出的牺牲感到愤怒——诺曼·芬克尔斯坦。“他们有权生存……他们不想被牺牲。真主党也有责任援助伊朗……受到寻求结束其文明的势力的攻击。” -> 真主党是因为占领而存在的。诺曼关于真主党的说法是错误的。真主党的建立是为了回应以色列对黎巴嫩的占领。而且不，这段视频不是伪造或捏造的。在这里观看完整采访。

text: Reza Pahlavi: Everyone keeps asking: when will the Iranian people rise? I don’t say they will rise right away—but at the right moment.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：每个人都在问：伊朗人民什么时候会起义？我不是说他们会立即起义——但在合适的时机。

text: Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun to Chinese President Xi in Beijing: Today... I deeply feel the concerned gaze of the entire world. Kuomintang and the Communist Party to jointly promote the institutionalization of cross-strait peace. Based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence, the two sides should further plan and construct institutional and sustainable dialogue and cooperation mechanisms. To make the peaceful development of the two sides irreversible, and to fundamentally eliminate all root causes of conflict.
text_zh: 台湾反对党领袖程丽文在北京对中国国家主席习近平说：今天……我深切感受到全世界关切的目光。国民党与共产党共同推动两岸和平制度化。在坚持“九二共识”、反对台独的共同政治基础上，双方应进一步规划和构建制度化、可持续的对话与合作机制。使两岸和平发展不可逆转，从根本上消除一切冲突根源。

text: Reza Pahlavi: We never sought military intervention in our country.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：我们从未寻求对我国进行军事干预。

text: BIG: Chinese President Xi Jinping met Taiwan opposition leader Cheng Li-wun in Beijing: The leaders of the two parties are meeting today to safeguard the peace and tranquility of our shared home. To promote the peaceful development of cross-strait relations. We are willing, based on the common political foundation of adhering to the 1992 Consensus and opposing Taiwan independence... To seek peace for both sides of the strait, to seek well-being for our compatriots, and to seek rejuvenation for the nation. To firmly hold the future of cross-strait relations in the hands of the Chinese people themselves.
text_zh: 重大：中国国家主席习近平在北京会见台湾反对党领袖程丽文：两党领导人今天会面，是为了维护我们共同家园的和平与安宁。为了促进两岸关系和平发展。我们愿意在坚持“九二共识”、反对台独的共同政治基础上……为海峡两岸谋和平，为同胞谋福祉，为民族谋复兴。将两岸关系的未来牢牢掌握在中华民族自己手中。
